info.description: Person profiles (ambassadors, judges, leadership, etc.), grouped by the free-text `category` field. pathSlug sets the public URL; MDX is always stored flat under src/content/profile/ (or profile/es/).

pathSlug.description: Full path from the site root, no leading slash. Determines the public URL only. Examples: hackathon/2025/judges/jane-doe; summit/2025/speakers/jane-doe; grant/fellowship/jane-doe.

section.description: Site section this profile belongs to. Controls the MDX storage folder prefix.

description.description: Short optional description or bio blurb shown on profile cards and detail pages.

role.description: Job title or role shown under the profile name on the detail page (e.g. 'Open Web Advocate & Open Source Contributor').

photo.description: Image alt text comes from the media Alternative text field when set; otherwise MDX export uses the profile name as photoAlt.

category.description: Groups profiles for summary views (e.g. '2025 Hackathon Judges', 'Leadership Team', 'Fellows 2026').
